## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's current and emerging work streams, discussing their maturity levels and potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Editorial content (new and refreshes) is GrowthX's most mature offering, with opportunities to improve tracking and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Programmatic content and link building are growing work streams, but processes need refinement for scalability and impact](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [GrowthX is exploring new work streams (e.g., content repurposing, thought leadership) to diversify offerings and provide more value to clients](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

## Topics

### Current Work Streams Overview

  - [Editorial content (new and refreshes): Most common offering, typically 50k-100k words/month, starting at $9k](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Programmatic content: Repeatable content following templates, growing to 20-30% of business](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Link building: Newer offering, reaching about 10% of business](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Outbound email campaigns: Exploring potential in this area](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

### Editorial Content Improvements

  - [Need better tracking and accountability for progress towards engagement goals](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve content refresh processes for greater SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Refining workflows for different content types beyond new editorial](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Programmatic Content Challenges

  - [Current processes skew towards editorial, need more repeatable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Lack of engineering capacity for automated content publishing is a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Working with experienced team members (e.g., Dave) to improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Link Building and Outreach

  - [Jimmy helping to leverage existing workflows for programmatic outreach](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [Facing complexities in modern outreach campaigns (e.g., managing multiple mailboxes)](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Evaluating long-term viability of outbound email campaigns work stream](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### Emerging Work Streams

  - [Content repurposing: Creating articles from podcasts, webinars, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Thought leadership content on platforms like Medium](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Exploring email content generation to support client SDR teams](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Considering long-form content creation (e.g., ebooks, whitepapers)](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)

### Client Engagement Strategy

  - [Proactively pitching new ideas to clients (e.g., content repurposing for Galileo)](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Balancing innovation with capacity and compensation considerations](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Using GrowthX as a "client" to validate new offerings before pitching to external clients](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine programmatic content processes to improve scalability and impact](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Explore engineering solutions for automated content publishing in programmatic work streams](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Continue developing and validating new work stream ideas internally before pitching to clients](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Improve tracking and accountability measures for editorial content engagements](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Evaluate potential for content repurposing and thought leadership offerings](https://fathom.video/share/HETVfS9RVxQ3cv6YJxxMamjKcZhwn6yX?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
